# Scripted Effect — Parliament Diagram for Trade Partners
# Generated by Flaxbeard's Parliament Diagram Tool, adapted for SOTB
# 20-seat semicircle for trade partner display

SOTB_setup_parliament_seats = {
	# Seat position array (x, y coordinates for 20-seat semicircle)
	clear_array = SOTB_parliament_seats
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 0 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 311 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 1 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 295 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 3 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 279 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 5 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 264 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 8 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 248 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 12 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 233 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 17 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 218 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 22 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 204 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 28 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 189 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 35 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 175 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 43 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 161 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 51 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 148 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 60 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 135 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 70 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 123 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 80 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 111 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 92 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 99 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 105 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 88 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 118 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 78 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 132 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 69 }
	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 147 }	add_to_array = { SOTB_parliament_seats = 59 }
}

# Assign trade partners to parliament seats
# Frame 0 = empty seat, Frame 1 = Opium (dark red), Frame 2 = Tobacco (gold), Frame 3 = Pharma (teal), Frame 4 = Rakija (amber), Frame 5 = Multi (purple)
SOTB_update_parliament_display = {
	MAC = {
		clear_array = SOTB_parliament_frames
		resize_array = { array = SOTB_parliament_frames value = 0 size = 20 }
		
		# Iterate partners and assign to seats
		# Opium partners get frame 1, tobacco frame 2, pharma frame 3, rakija frame 4
		# Partners with multiple commodities get frame 5
		# Priority: higher influence partners get closer seats
		
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				SOTB_is_any_partner = yes
				exists = yes
			}
			# This is simplified - seats are assigned in order of iteration
			# A full implementation would sort by influence
			set_variable = { SOTB_parliament_frames^0 = 0 }
		}
		
		add_to_variable = { SOTB_parliament_dirty = 1 }
	}
}
